title: A Swordsman Learns Stillness
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on a swordsman learns stillness, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Swordsman Learns Stillness. Zoro fights Mr. 1 and begins confronting the challenge of cutting steel itself. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: Ahahaha! That dumb penguin must've been crushed to death!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: I told you I'm a mole...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: Gahhhh! No, stop! Let me gooo! Stooo- ooop!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: W-Watch out! There's a wall in front! Oh crap!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You don't have to tell me twice!

summary: This part develops a swordsman learns stillness and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
